content: Tagged current HEAD as v0.4.7 so the release includes the transport regression coverage and the aligned runtime version metadata.
Keep the canonical release checklist in RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md and point AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md to it, so the workflow stays centralized instead of drifting across duplicate copies.
Kept the optional PDF exports public by re-exporting them from a module alias in __init__.py, preserving the API while removing Ruff F401 warnings.
